title: Program Manager (Primary Care Network)
description:
Bridgepoint Health is the operator of United Primary Care Network (PCN). This role will work closely and oversee the various departments within the United PCN.

Responsibilities:

1. Operations and Administration

- Oversee the operations of United PCN.

- Engage and onboard relevant partners.

- Manage scheduling and rostering of services at our partner clinics.

- Support the PCN for all right siting with clusters.

2. Stakeholder Management

- Work with external stakeholders (United PCN partner clinics, AIC, MOH) to drive the objectives of the PCN.

- Keep abreast of all primary care related information including but not limited to guidelines, policies, circulars.

- Work closely with other PCNs and Cluster.

- Participate in forums and represent United PCN in these forums.

- Assist in the yearly audits of the PCN.

- Support all Healthier SG related initiatives.

3. Leadership

- Oversee and provide leadership to the various departments within the United PCN group.

- Data driven decision making to provide United PCN partners with up-to-date information.

- Oversee quarterly PCN meetings and be a secretariat for such meetings (mostly on Saturdays).

- Liaise with external vendors and suppliers to deliver necessary support for business needs.

Requirements:

1. Bachelor’s degree in healthcare related fields.

2. Data driven in approach.

3. Minimum 5 years of healthcare experience, including at least 2 years in a leadership role.

4. Familiarity with Excel and PowerPoint and Microsoft ecosystem.

postedCompany.description:
Bridgepoint Health Pte Ltd, the operating entity of Sheares Healthcare Group Pte Ltd in Singapore


Bridgepoint Health is bridging the gaps in healthcare in Singapore. Our unique model seeks to alleviate administrative burdens on doctors, amplify care for patients through auxiliary support and technology, and emphasise preventive and whole-of-person health. We aim to enhance our patients' well-being holistically, while reducing the overall cost of healthcare, making it more sustainable and accessible for all. In summary, we're your neighbourhood GP, but more. Our services include family medicine, dentistry, behavioural health, occupational health, maritime medical services, and corporate health solutions.
postedCompany.name: BRIDGEPOINT HEALTH PTE. LTD.
